title: Create contact page component/file
description: Add a new route or static page (e.g., src/pages/Contact.js/Contact.tsx) that will render the contact information UI.

title: Implement HTML markup for name and email fields
description: Add two <input> elements (type='text' for name, type='email' for email) with appropriate id, name, placeholder, and ARIA labels; ensure no <form> submit button or action is present.

title: Style the contact page with minimalist CSS
description: Write CSS (or SCSS/modules) to layout the inputs vertically, apply clean typography, spacing, and neutral colors; include focus outlines for accessibility.

title: Make the layout responsive
description: Use flexbox or CSS Grid with media queries to ensure the inputs and labels stack appropriately on mobile and desktop viewports.

title: Add accessibility enhancements
description: Ensure each input is associated with a <label> via htmlFor/id, provide sufficient color contrast, and test with screen readers; optionally add role='region' and aria-labelledby.

title: Validate and lint the implementation
description: Run ESLint/Stylelint checks, verify no console errors, and perform a quick visual regression test to confirm the page matches the design specs.
